name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools churn out visually cluttered, template-heavy slides that look machine-made and undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving teams an AI layer that enhances structure and content while preserving intentional, human-quality design. The result is decks that communicate clearly without the telltale signs of AI slop.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with clean, credible visuals
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks without design resources
Turning written reports or briefs into structured slide narratives
